// DO NOT EDIT: This file was automatically generated by Assassin.py

new entry "ASSASSIN_VANISH"
type "StatusData"
data "StatusType" "INVISIBLE"
using "INVISIBILITY"
data "RemoveConditions" "(IsStatusEvent(StatusEvent.OnAttack) and not HasSpellFlag(SpellFlags.Stealth,context.Source)) or (IsStatusEvent(StatusEvent.OnDamage) and TotalDamageDoneGreaterThan(0)) or not HasStatus('SNEAKING',context.Source)"
data "RemoveEvents" "OnAttack;OnDamage;OnStatusRemoved"
